title: [Task Sprint] QA Testing Report — Villume Admin

issues.display_title: Issue #1483: Integrate API Check Json Ver
issues.main_description_html:
New Route : /v1/exhibitions/viewer/:sid/json/version

Base_url Dev: http://192.168.1.201:9999/

Notes Update :

  • Route
  • Header | Authorization uses Bearer

QA Tester Summary - Issue #1483: Integrate API Check Json Ver

Suite: qa_testing/tests/e2e/api/issue_1483_check_json_version_api.spec.ts (Playwright - Chromium)
Environment: Dev https://dev.villume.com/ with Access-Code header, viewer https://dev-gallery.villume.com/XQKmuW7W, Go API host https://app2-dev.villume.com, issue-note IP http://192.168.1.201:9999
Overall Result: Passed

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 White Frontend API route contract Editor service calls ${environment.baseURL_go}/v1/exhibitions/viewer/${shareString}/json/version -> new viewer JSON version route is used TP Pass
2 White Bearer authorization integration Go API request goes through auth interceptor -> Authorization: Bearer <villume_token> is attached TP Pass
3 Gray Authenticated route on public dev host Valid viewer SID XQKmuW7W + Bearer token -> public dev Go API returns 200 TP Pass
4 Gray Authenticated route on issue-note IP Valid viewer SID XQKmuW7W + Bearer token -> note IP base returns 200 TP Pass
5 Black Missing Bearer token guard Same route without Authorization -> protected endpoint rejects the request TN Pass

Bug Notes

  • No bug found in the confirmed API integration scope.
  • The issue description lists Base_url Dev: http://192.168.1.201:9999/. The current frontend dev environment uses https://app2-dev.villume.com as environment.baseURL_go. Both the public dev Go API host and the note IP return 200 with a valid Bearer token.
  • Test data used: viewer SID XQKmuW7W, account testergothru@gmail.com.

Code Review

Area Reference Review
Go API base URL src/environments/environment.dev.ts baseURL_go and baseURL_GET_go point to https://app2-dev.villume.com; base_host points to https://dev.villume.com.
JSON version route src/app/pages/virtual-gallery/editor/editor.service.ts checkJsonVersion(shareString) calls ${environment.baseURL_go}/v1/exhibitions/viewer/${shareString}/json/version?t=${Date.now()}.
Bearer auth header src/app/shared/http-interceptor/auth.interceptor.ts Go API requests are detected by baseURL_go / baseURL_GET_go and get Authorization: Bearer <villume_token> unless a header is already provided.
Viewer test data https://dev-gallery.villume.com/XQKmuW7W Viewer route loads successfully and provides the valid sid/shareString for API verification.

Response Code Review

Request Expected Actual Result
GET https://app2-dev.villume.com/v1/exhibitions/viewer/XQKmuW7W/json/version with Authorization: Bearer <token> Route exists and accepts Bearer authorization 200 OK Pass
GET http://192.168.1.201:9999/v1/exhibitions/viewer/XQKmuW7W/json/version with Authorization: Bearer <token> Issue-note IP route exists and accepts Bearer authorization 200 OK Pass
GET https://app2-dev.villume.com/v1/exhibitions/viewer/XQKmuW7W/json/version without Authorization Protected endpoint rejects missing Bearer token 401 Unauthorized Pass
Browser https://dev-gallery.villume.com/XQKmuW7W Viewer page loads for the provided SID 200 OK page load Pass

White / Gray / Black Box Coverage

Box Coverage Result
White Box Reviewed environment dev base URL, EditorService.checkJsonVersion(), and auth interceptor Bearer behavior. Pass
Gray Box Logged in with the provided account, extracted villume_token, and verified the new API route on both configured dev hosts. Pass
Black Box Opened the viewer page and captured DevTools Network Fetch/XHR evidence; also verified the missing-token rejection path. Pass

Confusion Matrix

Classification Meaning Count
TP Expected behavior correctly passed 4
TN Expected negative behavior correctly rejected 1
FP Test reported a failure where behavior was acceptable 0
FN A required acceptance path is present but fails for users 0

Evidence

  • Screenshot: issue-1483-json-version-api-route-evidence.png
  • Screenshot: issue-1483-viewer-json-version-network-fetch-xhr-devtools.png
  • Video: issue-1483-viewer-json-version-network-fetch-xhr-devtools.mp4

Final QA Decision

Issue #1483 is ready to close as Passed. Apply labels Passed and Unit Testing, and assign to ekosy9.

Screenshots

API route response-code evidence for /v1/exhibitions/viewer/XQKmuW7W/json/version with and without Authorization: Bearer:

Viewer page https://dev-gallery.villume.com/XQKmuW7W with DevTools Network Fetch/XHR open, showing json/version requests:

issue-1483-viewer-json-version-network-fetch-xhr-devtools.mp4

• Make the Login, Register, Forgot Password, and Reset Password pages Standalone.

QA Tester Summary - Issue #1527: [Standalone] Migrate Authentication Pages

Suite: qa_testing/tests/e2e/standalone/issue_1527_auth_pages_standalone.spec.ts (Playwright - Chromium)
Environment: Dev https://dev.villume.com/ with Access-Code header, HTTPS errors ignored
Overall Result: Failed / Open Bug

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 White Auth source/component wiring Auth routes/components are reviewed -> forgot/reset routes lazy-load and login/register components are locally imported in layout dialog scope TP Pass
2 Black Forgot-password page render Visitor opens /forgot-password -> reset-request form renders and submit is blocked until required inputs/reCAPTCHA are satisfied TP Pass
3 Black Direct reset-password guard Visitor opens /reset-password without reset token -> app redirects to /404 instead of exposing reset form TP Pass
4 Gray Reset token handoff Visitor opens synthetic /resettoken?code=1527&token=qa-reset-token-1527 -> app resolves to /reset-password and renders set-new-password form TP Pass
5 Black Reset form validation User fills invalid/mismatched passwords -> inline validation appears and submit remains blocked TP Pass
6 Gray Reset submit contract Valid reset form submit is mocked -> request uses reset code/token and success UI renders without changing a real account TP Pass
7 Gray Forgot-password email delivery Real reset email should arrive after forgot-password request -> user reported no email received FN Fail

Bug Notes

  • Forgot-password email delivery was not received by the user on dev, so real reset email delivery could not be validated as passed.
  • This email-delivery issue is now treated as the blocking bug for this issue per QA direction.
  • Login/Register route validation was skipped per QA direction because the current implementation exposes login/register through layout dialog components, not dedicated /login or /register page routes.
  • Reset-password success was validated with a synthetic token and mocked API response to avoid changing a real account password.

Code Review

Area Reference Review
Auth routes src/app/routes/auth.routes.ts /forgot-password, /reset-password, and /resettoken are wired with loadComponent to their intended page components.
Login/Register components src/app/layouts/login/login.component.ts, src/app/layouts/sign-up/sign-up.component.ts, src/app/layouts/layouts.component.ts Login and Register are component/dialog based in the layout shell; route-level validation was skipped by QA direction.
Forgot password page src/app/pages/forgot-password/forgot-password.component.ts Component declares local imports and renders the reset-request form with reCAPTCHA dependency.
Reset token handoff src/app/pages/reset-password/reset-token/reset-token.component.ts Query code and token are stored in ResetPasswordService, then browser navigation continues to /reset-password.
Reset password page src/app/pages/reset-password/reset-password.component.ts Form validates required fields, minimum length, password confirmation, and blocks direct access when no token is present.
Reset API service src/app/pages/reset-password/reset-password.service.ts Submit sends reset code, new password fields, and Authorization: Bearer <token>.

Response Code Review

Request Expected Actual Result
GET /forgot-password Public auth page returns 200 OK and renders forgot-password form Page rendered the reset-request form Pass
Browser /reset-password without token User should not see reset form without token App redirected to /404 Pass
Browser /resettoken?code=1527&token=qa-reset-token-1527 Handoff should open /reset-password form Set-new-password form rendered Pass
Mocked PATCH /v1/auth/password Request should include code, password fields, and bearer token Mock captured expected payload and token Pass
Real forgot-password email delivery Reset email should be received by user User reported no email received Fail

White / Gray / Black Box Coverage

Box Coverage Result
White Box Reviewed auth route declarations, login/register dialog components, forgot/reset components, token handoff, and reset API service. Pass for migration scope
Gray Box Used synthetic reset token and mocked reset submit to validate handoff/API contract without changing a real account. Pass
Black Box Opened forgot-password route, verified reset guard behavior, checked reset form validation and success UI. Email delivery remains failed/not received. Fail on email delivery

Confusion Matrix

Classification Meaning Count
TP Expected behavior correctly passed 6
TN Expected negative behavior correctly rejected 0
FP Test reported a failure where behavior was acceptable 0
FN A required acceptance path is present but fails for users 1

Evidence

  • Screenshot: issue-1527-forgot-password-route.png
  • Screenshot: issue-1527-reset-password-without-token-guard.png
  • Screenshot: issue-1527-reset-token-form.png
  • Screenshot: issue-1527-reset-password-validation.png
  • Screenshot: issue-1527-reset-password-mocked-success.png
  • Screenshot: issue-1527-video-success-frame.png
  • Video: issue-1527-auth-reset-addressbar.mp4

Final QA Decision

Issue #1527 should remain open as a bug. The migration/rendering scope passed, but forgot-password email delivery was not received on dev. Apply labels Bug and Sanity Testing, and assign to ekosy9.

Screenshots

Forgot-password route renders the reset-request form; real email delivery is noted as not received:

Mocked reset submit reaches Password updated without changing a real account:

Reset-password inline validation blocks mismatched passwords:

Direct /reset-password without token is guarded and redirects to /404:

Synthetic /resettoken link opens the /reset-password form:

Video frame showing address bar on /reset-password during reset validation:

Video Recording

Address-bar recording covering forgot-password route, reset guard, synthetic reset token, validation, and mocked success:

issues.display_title: Issue #1667: [Slicing] Redesign Promo Codes List Layout
issues.main_description_html:
Type: Slicing (frontend build) · Epic: Promo Codes list (/promocodes) · ref #1659

Rebuild promocode-list.component markup (design: PromoCodes.html).

Scope: .admin-head (<h1>Promo codes</h1> + count + Add new promo code); .admin-subbar (search + .seg Show all/Active/Expired); .client-table with .code-chip + copy, .status (active/expired dot), .exp-*, .usage bar, row actions Edit/Delete; current-page column sort (Name/Discount/# Used); .empty-state; .pagination.

Acceptance: copy-to-clipboard works; sort reorders the current page; Edit routes with row code/name; Delete opens the modal. (Cross-page sort = backend follow-up.)

Part of the Support Console redesign (Clients + Promo Codes CRUD).
Refs: docs/15-06-2026/plan.md · docs/15-06-2026/brainstorm.md. Related: #1658–#1662 (Project 32).

Demo by Developer

QA Tester Summary - Issue #1667: Promo Codes List Layout

Suite: qa_testing/scripts/record-issue-1667-promocodes-list-clean.cjs (Playwright - Chromium + FFmpeg)
Environment: Dev https://dev.villume.com/promocodes with support account, Access-Code header, HTTPS errors ignored
Overall Result: Failed

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 Black Promo codes list layout Support user opens /promocodes -> admin head, count, Add button, search, filter segment, table rows, actions, and pagination are visible TP Pass
2 Black Copy promo code User clicks copy icon on a code chip -> code is copied to clipboard TP Pass
3 Black Expired filter User selects Expired -> only expired promo code rows are shown FN Fail
4 Black Current-page sort User clicks Name, Discount, and # Used headers -> current page reorders and sortable state is exposed FN Fail
5 Black Edit action User clicks Edit on a row -> edit route opens with the selected promo code context TP Pass
6 Black Delete action User clicks Delete -> confirmation modal opens TP Pass
7 Black Mobile responsive layout User opens /promocodes at mobile width -> layout remains centered and table uses internal horizontal scroll TP Pass
8 Gray Dev SSR build Run dev SSR build -> build completes successfully TP Pass

Bug Notes

  • Expired filter is selected and the URL changes to /promocodes?status=expired&page=1, but active rows are still visible in the result set. Examples captured: Pro one year 3, Unlimited Pro, and Giulia Basic Team show status Active under the Expired tab.
  • Current-page sort for Name, Discount, and # Used is not implemented in the rendered table. The headers are plain <th> elements with no aria-sort, sortable class, button, role, tabindex, or pointer cursor, and clicking them does not reorder the current page.
  • Copy-to-clipboard was verified by clipboard value. One clean retest observed the temporary button label already reset before assertion, so this was not counted as a functional bug.

Code Review

Area Reference Review
Promo codes list markup src/app/pages/promocodes/promocode-list/promocode-list.component.html New admin head, filter segment, table, code chips, usage bar, actions, empty state, and pagination are present.
Sortable columns src/app/pages/promocodes/promocode-list/promocode-list.component.html / .ts No visible sort handler, sortable header affordance, or accessible sort state was found for Name, Discount, or # Used.
Filter behavior /promocodes?status=expired&page=1 Filter segment selects Expired, but returned/rendered rows still include Active promo codes.
Edit route src/app/routes/promocodes.routes.ts Edit action routes to /promocodes/edit/:code/:promo_id; retest confirmed the selected promo code name loads after waiting for form data.

Response Code Review

Request Expected Actual Result
GET /promocodes in browser Promo codes list loads for support user Page loaded and displayed 1,034 promo codes Pass
GET /promocodes?status=expired&page=1 in browser Only expired promo codes are rendered Expired tab selected, but Active rows are still rendered Fail
Click Name / Discount / # Used headers Current page reorders Row order remains unchanged and headers expose no sort state Fail
npm.cmd run build:dev:ssr Build completes Build passed during verification Pass

White / Gray / Black Box Coverage

Box Coverage Result
White Box Reviewed promo code list component markup/routes for sort and edit behavior. Fail finding on missing sort implementation
Gray Box Verified query-param filter state, edit route state, and dev SSR build output. Failed on Expired filter behavior
Black Box Tested user-visible list, copy, filters, sort, edit, delete, and mobile layout with support account. Failed on Expired filter and sort

Confusion Matrix

Classification Meaning Count
TP Expected behavior correctly passed 6
TN Expected negative behavior correctly rejected 0
FP Test reported a failure where behavior was acceptable 0
FN A required acceptance path is present but fails for users 2

Evidence

  • Screenshot: issue-1667-promocodes-clean-desktop-list.png
  • Screenshot: issue-1667-promocodes-clean-copy-code.png
  • Screenshot: issue-1667-promocodes-clean-expired-filter-bug.png
  • Screenshot: issue-1667-promocodes-clean-sort-bug.png
  • Screenshot: issue-1667-promocodes-clean-edit-route.png
  • Screenshot: issue-1667-promocodes-clean-delete-modal.png
  • Screenshot: issue-1667-promocodes-clean-mobile.png
  • Video: issue-1667-promocodes-list-fullscreen-centered-cropped.mp4

Final QA Decision

Issue #1667 should remain open as a bug. Apply labels Bug and Sanity Testing, and assign to ekosy9.

Copy code action - clipboard value verified:

Delete action - confirmation modal:

Desktop promo codes list layout:

Edit action - selected promo code context loaded:

Expired filter bug - Active rows remain visible:

Mobile responsive layout - centered viewport:

Notes Update :

Suite: qa_testing/tests/e2e/api/issue_1510_contact_us_api_integration.spec.ts (Playwright - Chromium)
Environment: Dev https://dev.villume.com/contact with Access-Code header, HTTPS errors ignored; Go API host https://app2-dev.villume.com; issue-note IP http://192.168.1.201:9999
Overall Result: Passed

1 White Frontend API route contract Contact service submits via ${environment.baseURL_go}/v1/support/contact-us/${subject} -> new :subject path is used TP Pass
2 White Contact form subject mapping General, Help, and Custom contact forms -> call postContactUs() with the expected subject source TP Pass
3 Gray Dev API host route exposure app2-dev.villume.com and the issue-note IP expose /v1/support/contact-us/:subject -> route is not missing/404 TP Pass
4 Black Contact page Network Fetch/XHR evidence Browser on /contact triggers/checks subject routes -> DevTools Network shows contact, help, and custom route requests TP Pass

Bug Notes

  • No bug found in the confirmed API integration scope.
  • The issue description lists Base_url Dev: http://192.168.1.201:9999/. The current frontend dev environment uses https://app2-dev.villume.com as environment.baseURL_go. Both the public dev Go API host and the note IP respond on the new route.

issues.display_title: Issue #1446: [Build] Consolidate Server & Browser SSR Configuration
issues.main_description_html:
• Adjust the options in angular.json since the application builder natively consolidates the browser and server builds into a single execution target.

QA Tester Summary - Issue #1446: [Build] Consolidate Server & Browser SSR Configuration

Suite: Manual build verification through package scripts (npm run build, npm run build:ssr, npm run build:dev:ssr, npm run build:qa:ssr)
Environment: Local Windows workspace C:\Users\Work\github-projects\villume-admin; Angular application builder; Node/npm from project environment
Overall Result: Passed

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 White Build script configuration Existing package scripts use Angular application build targets -> browser and server bundles are generated from one build execution TP Pass
2 Gray Default build Run npm run build -> browser and server bundles are generated in dist/villume-admin TP Pass
3 Gray Production SSR build Run npm run build:ssr -> production browser/server bundles are generated successfully TP Pass
4 Gray Dev SSR build Run npm run build:dev:ssr -> dev browser/server bundles are generated successfully TP Pass
5 Gray QA SSR build Run npm run build:qa:ssr -> QA browser/server bundles are generated successfully TP Pass

Bug Notes

  • No build blocker found in the confirmed scope.
  • build:dev:ssr and build:qa:ssr initially failed inside the restricted sandbox with Cannot read directory "../..": Access is denied; rerunning the same commands outside the sandbox completed successfully.
  • The sandbox-only permission failure is not treated as an application build bug because the same commands pass in the normal workspace execution context.

Code Review

Area Reference Review
Default build script package.json npm run build executes ng build, which generates browser and server output with the current application builder setup.
Production SSR script package.json npm run build:ssr executes ng build --configuration production.
Dev SSR script package.json npm run build:dev:ssr executes ng build --configuration=dev.
QA SSR script package.json npm run build:qa:ssr executes ng build --configuration=qa.
Output target dist/villume-admin All successful builds generated the expected application output directory.

Response Code Review

Command Expected Actual Result
npm run build Build completes and generates dist/villume-admin Completed successfully Pass
npm run build:ssr Production SSR build completes Completed successfully Pass
npm run build:dev:ssr Dev SSR build completes Completed successfully after non-sandbox rerun Pass
npm run build:qa:ssr QA SSR build completes Completed successfully after non-sandbox rerun Pass

White / Gray / Black Box Coverage

Box Coverage Result
White Box Reviewed package build scripts and confirmed the consolidated build commands are present. Pass
Gray Box Executed default, production SSR, dev SSR, and QA SSR build scripts and verified successful bundle generation. Pass
Black Box Not applicable for this build-only task; no UI/browser behavior was required by the issue description. Skipped

Confusion Matrix

Classification Meaning Count
TP Expected behavior correctly passed 5
TN Expected negative behavior correctly rejected 0
FP Test reported a failure where behavior was acceptable 0
FN A required acceptance path is present but fails for users 0

Evidence

  • Build log: npm run build passed.
  • Build log: npm run build:ssr passed.
  • Build log: npm run build:dev:ssr passed after sandbox permission rerun.
  • Build log: npm run build:qa:ssr passed after sandbox permission rerun.

Final QA Decision

Issue #1446 is ready to close as Passed. Apply labels Passed and Unit Testing, and assign to ekosy9.

Build verification matrix for consolidated browser/server SSR configuration:

Address-bar recording showing the Issue #1446 build verification evidence:

issues.display_title: Issue #1644: [integration] Migrate Settings to DashboardShellComponent and remove app-sidemenu
issues.main_description_html:
Fast-follow — extends the redesign to Settings (Profile / Account / Billing) using the shared DashboardShellComponent. Once done, the legacy sidemenu.component can be deleted entirely.

Acceptance: Settings pages use the new shell; app-sidemenu removed from the codebase with no remaining references.

Part of the My Galleries authenticated-surface redesign.
Refs: docs/brainstorm/05-06-2026/my galleries/plan.md · brainstorming.md

QA Tester Summary - Issue #1644: Migrate Settings to DashboardShellComponent and remove app-sidemenu

Suite: Scope review only; no execution test required because the issue is superseded
Environment: Repository review on local workspace; GitHub issue status checked
Overall Result: Skipped - Superseded

2 White Original acceptance review Original acceptance asks Settings to use DashboardShellComponent and remove app-sidemenu -> implementation is covered by #1645-#1657 instead TP Skipped
3 Gray Execution decision Superseded issue is already closed -> no redundant browser execution is required for this umbrella task TP Skipped

Bug Notes

  • No new bug is filed from #1644 because the maintainer comment states this umbrella issue is superseded.

  • A literal source scan still finds app-sidemenu / SidemenuComponent references, but this is not reported as a #1644 failure because the scope was explicitly moved to the granular tasks.

issues.display_title: Issue #1664: [Integration] Add Support Dropdown To Header
issues.main_description_html:
Type: Integration (wiring) · Epic: Foundation

Add the "Support" dropdown (.nav-menu → Clients / Promo codes) to the redesigned HeaderComponent.

Scope: dropdown with Esc/outside-click close + aria-expanded/aria-haspopup; gated on user_type === 'support' (mirrors AuthSupportGuard). Support pages render in the standard shell (no dashboard sidebar).

Acceptance: dropdown shows only for support users; routes to /support + /promocodes; active state correct; keyboard-accessible.

Part of the Support Console redesign (Clients + Promo Codes CRUD).
Refs: docs/15-06-2026/plan.md · docs/15-06-2026/brainstorm.md. Related: #1658–#1662 (Project 32).

Demo by Developer

2026-06-18.14-48-07.mp4

Suite: qa_testing/scripts/record-issue-1664-clean-objective.cjs (Playwright - Chromium headed evidence) + npm run build:dev:ssr
Environment: Dev https://dev.villume.com/ with support account villumesupport@gmail.com, Access-Code header, HTTPS errors ignored
Overall Result: Passed

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result

2 Black Support-only gating Login as support account -> Support trigger is visible with aria-haspopup="menu" TP Pass

4 Gray Keyboard accessibility Press Escape while dropdown is open -> dropdown closes and aria-expanded returns to false TP Pass
5 Black Clients route Click Clients from Support dropdown -> /support opens and Clients page renders in the standard shell TP Pass
6 Black Promo codes route Click Promo codes from Support dropdown -> /promocodes opens and Promo codes page renders in the standard shell TP Pass
7 Gray Active state Support trigger and active dropdown item reflect the current support route TP Pass
8 Black Outside click close Click outside the open dropdown -> menu closes cleanly TP Pass
9 Black Mobile drawer support links Mobile menu for support user -> Support section shows Clients and Promo codes links TP Pass

Bug Notes

  • No blocking bug found in the final clean verification.
  • Earlier evidence had a false-negative selector issue because hidden duplicate menu items were read before the visible popover items. The final objective run validates the visible menu items and passes all acceptance checks.

Code Review

Route guards src/app/routes/app-features.routes.ts and src/app/routes/promocodes.routes.ts /support and /promocodes are protected by authSupportGuard.

issues.display_title: Issue #1663: [Slicing] Add Support Admin Styles To _admin.scss
issues.main_description_html:
Type: Slicing (frontend build) · Epic: Foundation

Port the New-Villume-2 admin/table/form/modal styles into a new shared partial src/assets/scss/common/_admin.scss, imported from styles.scss.

Classes: .admin, .admin-head/.admin-title/.admin-tools/.admin-search/.admin-subbar, .table-wrap/.table-scroll/.client-table, th.sortable+aria-sort, .pagination/.pag-*, .empty-state, .client-cell/.client-avatar/.client-id/.cell-mono, .code-chip/.code-copy, .status/.dot, .discount, .usage/.usage-track/.usage-fill, .exp-never/.exp-date, .seg, .row-actions/.icon-btn.danger, .modal/.modal-scrim/.modal-dialog/.confirm-dialog, .form-head/.form-card/.form-section/.code-row/.input-affix/.dur-stack/.form-actions, .form-summary/.fs-*.

Acceptance: uses _design-tokens.scss (no hard-coded colors); light + dark; no vi vi-* / col16-*.

Part of the Support Console redesign (Clients + Promo Codes CRUD).
Refs: docs/15-06-2026/plan.md · docs/15-06-2026/brainstorm.md. Related: #1658–#1662 (Project 32).

Demo by Developer

QA Tester Summary - Issue #1663: [Slicing] Add Support Admin Styles To _admin.scss

Suite: qa_testing/scripts/capture-issue-1663-visual-precision.cjs (Playwright - Chromium headed visual evidence) + npm run build:dev:ssr
Environment: Dev https://dev.villume.com/ with support account villumesupport@gmail.com, Access-Code header, HTTPS errors ignored
Overall Result: Passed

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 White Build verification Run npm run build:dev:ssr -> browser/server bundles build successfully TP Pass
2 Black Clients desktop light Open /support at 1440px -> admin table layout is aligned, proportional, and not visually distorted TP Pass
3 Black Promo codes desktop dark Open /promocodes at 1440px with dark theme -> table, controls, and header remain aligned TP Pass
4 Black Promo code form tablet Open /promocodes/add at 1024px -> form card and live preview layout remain balanced TP Pass
5 Black Delete modal desktop Open delete confirmation modal -> modal is centered, readable, and proportional TP Pass
6 Black Promo codes mobile Open /promocodes at 390px -> layout remains centered and table uses internal horizontal scroll without body overflow TP Pass
7 Black Clients mobile dark Open /support at 390px with dark theme -> layout remains centered and table uses internal horizontal scroll without body overflow TP Pass

Bug Notes

  • No visual slicing blocker found.
  • Mobile tables intentionally keep wide tabular content inside the .table-scroll container. The page body does not visually overflow, and controls/cards are not stretched, squashed, or overlapping.
  • Architecture/code-placement checks for _admin.scss were skipped per QA direction; this pass decision is based on visual precision and build verification.

Code Review

Area Reference Review

Promo codes layout /promocodes Admin header, CTA, segmented filters, table rows, status dots, code chips, and row actions remain aligned in light/dark/mobile views.
Promo code form /promocodes/add Form card and live preview render with balanced spacing and no visible overlap at tablet width.
Modal Delete confirmation dialog Dialog is centered, proportional, readable, and action buttons are not clipped.

issues.display_title: Issue #1665: [Slicing] Redesign Support Clients Page Layout
issues.main_description_html:
Type: Slicing (frontend build) · Epic: Clients (/support) · ref #1658

Rebuild support.component markup on the .admin table (design: Support.html).

Scope: .admin-head (<h1>Clients</h1> + total) + .admin-search + field <select>; .client-table (avatar-initials + name/email, Member since, Last login date+time, Log in action); .empty-state; .pagination.

Acceptance: renders on the new table; dark mode + responsive (horizontal scroll); no legacy markup.

Part of the Support Console redesign (Clients + Promo Codes CRUD).
Refs: docs/15-06-2026/plan.md · docs/15-06-2026/brainstorm.md. Related: #1658–#1662 (Project 32).
